Home About Boba

tier list 04/2026

  • 04/2026: I had some great Chagee in China this year, and lately Shu Shia and Heytea have been growing on me more. Molly Tea is always solid but kind of one-note. Among the Taiwanese chains, Chicha has been sliding down a bit for me since I only like their Dong Ding Oolong, while Torotea has good everything.
  • 12/2024: First tier list which got shit on by mainland Chinese on XHS for liking Taiwanese tea over 3catea (why???).

Site theme - brume
